name: Allegany County Sch Bus Contrs
registry_source: MD SDAT (not directly verified); property owner records via NeighborWho show 10401 Red Maple Ln, Ellerslie associated with Edward Williams / Lisa Hatton / L Williams / E Williams
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). Name appears to refer to a local Allegany County (MD) school bus contractor association/group or a contractor at the listed Ellerslie address. MD School Bus Contractors Assn (MSBCA, statewide) is a known umbrella org; no separate 'Allegany County School Bus Contractors' nonprofit/registry record found. Property at 10401 Red Maple Ln, Ellerslie 21529 (Allegany County) is residential, owner-occupied per public records (Edward/Lisa Williams). Likely small intrastate MD school bus contractor for Allegany County Public Schools.

name: Second Mile Support LLC
registry_source: Prosper Chamber of Commerce member listing; company website secondmilesupport.com
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate, vans/passenger vehicles only). Parent-owned student transportation business in Prosper, TX providing door-to-door rides for middle school students who live within 2 miles of campus (district does not bus them). Hires parents/guardians with background checks. Active member of Prosper Chamber. Texas SOS filing date not verifiable without paid lookup; entity listed as LLC.

name: JCR Transportation Inc
notes: No USDOT in MA matching this entity (likely intrastate; only MA JCR carrier in SAFER is JCR TRUCKING USDOT 1762407 in Revere, different business). Listings show JCR Transportation at 10 Millennium Dr, Bourne, MA 02532 (Birdeye) and 38 Red Brook Rd, East Falmouth, MA (Yelp) - Cape Cod area transportation services. MA SOS Corp database was not directly accessible to confirm Inc filing date/officers. USDOT 929420 'JCR Transportation LLC' is a different TX entity (Ed/Judi Rodgers) - not this MA company.

name: Mommy Drives Inc
registry_source: Manta business directory (Michigan LARA not directly accessed); year established 2000 per Manta
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate, small passenger vans). Ground transportation/student transportation company at 1808 Wilmont Dr SE, Kentwood, MI 49508. Per Manta: established 2000, incorporated in Michigan, ~10-19 employees, est. revenue $500K-$1M. Likely small intrastate carrier serving Grand Rapids/Kentwood-area schools. MI LARA MiBusiness Registry search not directly executable here (search-only portal); recommend manual lookup at mibusinessregistry.lara.state.mi.us.

name: Hessian Inc Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: Not verified in CA SOS bizfileonline (search-only portal); no public corp record found matching this entity at 1135 MLK Dr Hayward
notes: No USDOT. Name 'Hessian Inc Which Will Do Bus[iness] [As]...' is a truncated 'will do business as' style entry — actual DBA not captured in source list. Address 1135 Martin Luther King Dr, Hayward CA 94541 hosts 'Hessian Parent Corporation' (CA Stock Corp, filed 1/16/2019, status: Forfeited - FTB) along with several other LLCs (Progrid Ventures LLC, Blue Willow AI LLC, Gammax LLC) — all appear to be tech/holding entities, not bus operators. The CA School Buses entry may be mis-coded or refer to a defunct/repurposed entity. Likely defunct or never operated as a school bus carrier; possible data error in source list. CA SOS bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov should be checked manually for any remaining 'Hessian' entities with bus DBA.
